---
id: retrieves-family-members-locations
title: "Retrieves family members' locations"
description: "Returns the last known locations of all family members who have enabled location sharing. Requires the family feature to be enabled and the user to be part of a family."
sidebar_label: "Retrieves family members' locations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves family members' locations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/families/locations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the last known locations of all family members who have enabled location sharing. Requires the family feature to be enabled and the user to be part of a family.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
